projects.title: Checking the bacterial contamination in drinking water by testing sulphide ion
projects.details: Scientific investigation involving laboratory testing to detect sulphide ions indicating bacterial contamination.

projects.title: Study of the methods of purification of water
projects.details: Investigation into various techniques used for purifying water sources.

projects.title: Testing the hardness, presence of Iron, Fluoride, Chloride in drinking water
projects.details: Regional variation study of ions in drinking water and analysis of causes for presence above permissible limits.

projects.title: Investigation of the foaming capacity of different washing soaps
projects.details: Study on the effect of adding Sodium carbonate on the foaming capacity of various washing soaps.

projects.title: Study the acidity of different samples of tea leaves
projects.details: Analysis of acidity levels in various tea leaf samples.

projects.title: Determination of the rate of evaporation of different liquids
projects.details: Experimental study comparing evaporation rates across different liquid types.

projects.title: Study the effect of acids and bases on the tensile strength of fibers
projects.details: Investigation into how acidic and basic environments alter the structural integrity of fibers.

projects.title: Study of acidity of fruit and vegetable juices
projects.details: Analysis of pH levels in various fruit and vegetable juice samples.

practicals.title: Cutting glass tube and glass rod
practicals.details: Fundamental skill in handling laboratory glassware.

practicals.title: Bending a glass tube
practicals.details: Technique for shaping glass tubes for experimental setups.

practicals.title: Drawing out a glass jet
practicals.details: Method to create fine glass jets for precise chemical delivery.

practicals.title: Boring a cork
practicals.details: Skill in preparing corks to fit apparatus securely.

practicals.title: Determination of melting point of an organic compound
practicals.unit_name: Characterization and Purification of Chemical Substances
practicals.details: Experimental method to identify purity and identity of organic compounds.

practicals.title: Determination of boiling point of an organic compound
practicals.unit_name: Characterization and Purification of Chemical Substances
practicals.details: Technique to determine the boiling point for substance characterization.

practicals.title: Crystallization of impure sample (Alum, Copper Sulphate, Benzoic Acid)
practicals.unit_name: Characterization and Purification of Chemical Substances
practicals.details: Purification technique using crystallization for specific organic or inorganic compounds.

practicals.title: Determination of pH of solutions (fruit juices, acids, bases, salts)
practicals.details: Using pH paper or universal indicator to measure acidity/basicity of various solutions.

practicals.title: Comparing the pH of strong and weak acids of same concentration
practicals.details: Investigation into the difference in pH levels between strong and weak acids.

practicals.title: Study the pH change in titration of a strong base using universal indicator
practicals.details: Observation of pH variations during the neutralization process.

practicals.title: Study the pH change by common-ion in weak acids and weak bases
practicals.details: Analysis of the common ion effect on the dissociation of weak electrolytes.

practicals.title: Study the shift in equilibrium between ferric ions and thiocyanate ions
practicals.details: Observation of Le Chatelier's principle by varying ion concentrations.

practicals.title: Study the shift in equilibrium between [Co(H2O)6] and chloride ions
practicals.details: Investigation of color change and equilibrium shift upon changing ion concentration.

practicals.title: Using a mechanical balance/electronic balance
practicals.details: Fundamental skill for accurate mass measurement in quantitative analysis.

practicals.title: Preparation of standard solution of Oxalic acid
practicals.details: Creation of a primary standard solution for titration purposes.

practicals.title: Determination of strength of Sodium hydroxide by titrating against Oxalic acid
practicals.details: Volumetric analysis to calculate the concentration of NaOH.

practicals.title: Preparation of standard solution of Sodium carbonate
practicals.details: Creation of a standard solution for use in acid-base titrations.

practicals.title: Determination of strength of Hydrochloric acid by titrating against Sodium Carbonate
practicals.details: Volumetric analysis to calculate the concentration of HCl.

practicals.title: Determination of one anion and one cation in a given salt
practicals.details: Systematic identification of cations (Pb, Cu, Al, Fe, Mn, Ni, Zn, Co, Ca, Sr, Ba, Mg, NH4) and anions (CO3, S, SO3, NO3, NO2, Cl, Br, I, SO4, PO4, CH3COO).

practicals.title: Detection of Nitrogen, Sulphur, Chlorine in organic compounds
practicals.details: Lassaigne's test or similar methods to detect heteroatoms in organic substances.
